name: python3-sklearn-lib
title: python3-sklearn-lib
summary: low-level implementations and bindings for scikit-learn - Python 3
description:
low-level implementations and bindings for scikit-learn - Python 3
This is an add-on package for python-sklearn. It provides
low-level implementations and custom Python bindings for the LIBSVM
library.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-sklearn-lib because low-level implementations and bindings for scikit-learn - Python 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-sklearn-lib as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-sklearn-lib with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-sklearn-lib --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
